sourceNote: Full MCC callout drill from FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.4.4, Group 2 procedure. Power lever goes to IDLE (not retard) to allow unfeather attempt. Autofeather switch OFF if applicable — no ▲ required. Propeller unfeather branch included. All ▲ critical actions requiresConfirmation=true.
